tiles.title: Ceramic Blue Tile
tiles.description: Premium ceramic tile with a smooth blue glaze finish, designed to enhance both modern and classic interiors. Its durable surface resists moisture, stains, and scratches.

tiles.title: Marble White Tile
tiles.description: Elegant marble tile featuring polished white surface with natural veining, perfect for luxury interiors and premium flooring applications.

tiles.title: Granite Black Tile
tiles.description: Strong black granite tile designed for heavy traffic areas. Resistant to heat, water, and scratches with a sleek modern finish.

tiles.title: Wood Finish Tile
tiles.description: Porcelain tile with realistic wood texture offering natural warmth with zero maintenance required like real wood flooring.

tiles.title: Mosaic Green Tile
tiles.description: Glossy green mosaic tile designed for decorative walls and kitchen backsplashes, adding vibrant texture and artistic appeal.

tiles.title: Rustic Brown Tile
tiles.description: Matte rustic ceramic tile inspired by natural earthy tones, ideal for warm traditional interior spaces.

tiles.title: Luxury Gold Tile
tiles.description: High-end designer tile with golden texture finish, perfect for luxury hotels, feature walls, and premium interiors.

tiles.title: Concrete Grey Tile
tiles.description: Minimal industrial concrete-style tile with matte grey finish, perfect for modern apartments and office spaces.

tiles.title: Patterned Vintage Tile
tiles.description: Decorative vintage tile with artistic patterns inspired by classic European interior designs.

tiles.title: Outdoor Stone Tile
tiles.description: Durable natural stone tile designed for outdoor use with weather resistance and anti-slip surface.

tiles.title: Glossy Ivory Tile
tiles.description: Elegant ivory ceramic tile with glossy finish that reflects light and makes interiors feel spacious and bright.

tiles.title: Slate Texture Tile
tiles.description: Rough slate textured tile ideal for outdoor areas like patios, terraces, and garden pathways.

tiles.title: Classic Beige Tile
tiles.description: Soft beige porcelain tile with neutral tone that fits perfectly in any modern or traditional interior.

tiles.title: Dark Concrete Tile
tiles.description: Bold dark concrete tile designed for industrial-style interiors with a strong modern aesthetic.

tiles.title: Decor Floral Tile
tiles.description: Beautiful floral patterned ceramic tile designed for decorative wall accents and artistic interior styling.
